title: Heart N Soul Collide by Zillick feat. th3scr1b3
description: Exploring search for identity and love and connection.
lyrics: When do I find the point where the heart and soul collide? Been looking for so long. The journey's not over yet. Not even close. Let's go. Been looking for that someone, something, someplace. Anything to erase the void that I hold every day. Always told stop looking it'll come. If I do that I'll die old and alone. Never took the time. Merely just observed. Everyone around me found that special place. Feeling of want, love, happiness. The feeling of home. Somewhere to go. A place to call their own. Man you know the feelings we don't wanna hold. If I could be so bold. When will I find the time to find when the heart and soul that they collide? When will it be my time? When will I find the time to find when the heart and soul that they collide? When will it be my time? When will it be our time? I never expected to find it. Expectations lead to heartache. Thought that if I was patient and waiting my time would come. But the days grow old into the night. How long is too long to wait for something that can never come? I don't wanna do this all alone. Gas and match. Wrong time still here. Make it last. Go past the hurt. Loss of pride. Make a commitment. Get sentiment. Be open to life. The new, new, new. See what you need. Eat past mistakes. Life quakes and morn wakes. Time is finite. Open to the infinite. Beyond this world you'll see. Way past me. Fear forces the close spark. Your heart and soul collide. From the ashes you find you. Well who knew? Fear forces the close spark. Your heart and soul collide. From the ashes you find you. Who knew? Yeah, who knew you'd find you? Through all the pain and everything you've gone through, baby. Who knew you'd find you? When will I find the time to find? When the heart and soul that they collide. When will it be my time? When will I find the time to find? When the heart and soul that they collide. When will it be my time? When will it be my time? When will it be our time? When will it be our time? When will it be our time? When will it be our time? When will it be our time? When will it be our time?
